trends.headline: DHS startles Congress with request for millions to develop ICE ‘smart glasses’
trends.summary: The Homeland Security Department requested $7.5 million for research and development projects, including prototype “smart glasses” that will give federal agents access to biometric identification data in the field.

trends.headline: Map serial string commands to function addresses without using the heap
